item.title: Smol dump of quietly qualitative amazing video memes
item.description:
Nice Trick ...
2 : Someone in Chile has invented bicycles with a built-in anti-theft system
perfect circle
4 : Making a Rug using a tufting Gun
Dude shows off his invisibility shield
6 : Some cows in Ireland swimming over to an island to graze.
just like cards
8 : color matching paint
A Parking Job. Backing an 18 wheeler in a tight spot.
10 : Perfectly timed shot
When two become one ....
12 : Mold casting an enclosed ceramic dish
Victor Navlet painted this masterpiece in 1855 from memory after flying over Paris in a balloon. Enjoy ! No one dies in this post and no animals were harmed.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.description: and we care. That is all.
item.dc:creator: ironman3010

item.title: Tomorrow, Thailand embraces marriage equality
item.description:
BANGKOK (AP) — It’s a big week for LGBTQ+ couples in Thailand. On Thursday, they will be able to legally register their marriages, making it only the third place in Asia, after Taiwan and Nepal, where they have such a right. A grand celebration is planned in central Bangkok to facilitate hundreds of same-sex couples who plan to register their marriages on the very first day. Source: https://apnews.com/article/thailand-marriage-equality-law-couples-photos-0bbc6b4771a16efeefbe7397eb6a4dd0
Congratulations to our LGBTQIA+ Thai homies! This is only first step of many, but it proves something important: In 2025, even good things can happen.
item.dc:creator: ruint

item.dc:creator: dizzyturtle

item.title: I just enjoyed the movie
item.description: I honestly never really cared for any movies I'd seen him in. I'm well aware it's just my opinion too. My wife loves him. But a basic no spoiler review for the the film. It was fun. Nick had no problems poking fun at himself. Pedro Pascal, well, he was beyond funny. It's on Netflix now. Recommend. Don't expect Shakespeare. But it was a fun time. I've been down with flu for the last 4 days and am so bored I'm watching things that I have a passing interest in.
item.dc:creator: Eomund521

item.title: There is no one who is sufficiently pure for fascists.
item.description:
Just grabbed this off Tumblr but the message needs to be spread far and wide. Even if you think that your blonde-haired blue-eyed heterosexual cisgender ass is safe, eventually you will have an ideological difference with a fascist and they will declared that you need to be tossed in the camps with the other "degenerates" and "undesirables".
Yeah.
item.dc:creator: AndyTheAbsurd

item.title: Meme dump without politics or bots vol 13
item.description:
Vol 12 found here: https://imgur.com/gallery/meme-dump-without-politics-bots-vol-12-i1kCCjt
Very very silly and it works.
Not a medium roast, jfc.
And when you guys invent new drugs, hook us up ok?
"His people are completely literal. Metaphors are gonna go over his head."
Ph'nglui mglw'nafh Cthulhu R'lyeh wgah'nagl fhtagn. Now.
Or don't. I'm not your supervisor.

item.title: LA Police investigation reveals that celebrity musician Billy Joel is responsible for starting the Los Angeles fires.
item.description: The 75 year-old singer adamantly denies this allegation, claiming that fires have always been burning.
item.dc:creator: TypicallyMisjudged

item.title: Things seen this week during structural assessments!
item.description:
A girder is a large horizontal beam that serves as the main support for a structure. This girder has snapped in half, compromising the home’s structural integrity.
A soft-story building is a multi-story structure built with a ground floor that is significantly weaker than the floors above, such as in an apartment with tuck under parking.
A beam in this soft-story building has rotted out. Soft-story buildings are inherently at a higher risk of failure due to their weak design, and this compromised area makes the structure even more vulnerable to collapse.
The entire support system of this crawlspace—which is meant to be bearing the weight of the home above—is failing.
Watch as our structural assessor, Chris, shows just how weak this system has become.
The recent extreme winds folded part of this roof over.
This partially damaged the framing of the home, leaving it exposed to further issues like water intrusion and weakening its overall structural stability.
Because of the strong winds, a tree fell on one of our employee’s homes in Altadena. The winds weren’t just strong—they were dangerous. These same gusts fueled many of the wildfires that affected several communities.
When we made the call, which was late afternoon, our crews immediately responded and showed up working late into the night without question to chainsaw the trees and clear up the debris. We couldn’t be prouder of our team!
Here’s how it looked after we cleared the area. The winds have been relentless, and the damage they’ve caused has been devastating. We’re grateful to have been able to step in and help, and we’ll continue to do so for those in need. We are still providing trucks and crews to help property owners move salvageable belongings, cut hazardous trees, create property access, and more. Email info@alphastructural.com with photos of the damage, your property address, and contact information and we will respond as fast as we can. You can also call us for free guidance on engineering questions, insurance claims, legal resources, and rebuilding consulting.
item.dc:creator: AlphaStructural

item.title: Phone clearing dumparoo #2
item.description:
I don't think ive ever made it to the front page! I wanted to share some love with you lovely Imgurians (the next image has nothing to do with love)
Okay, here are the ground rules for Nazis: You can punch them, kick them, pull their hair, I am A-Okay with them being stabbed. Biting and scratching are on the table. You can also use fire. But you got something really sick you wanna do, huh? Oh, you little perverts. All right, I like it. Don't tell me. Surprise me. Ooh, this is gonna be fun!
Believe it
Good byyeee...Earl
How do you like your eggs?
Everything was brown!
You deserve it
Wa Wa Wa
Please and thank you. But can I substitute the skele for a GF?
"Scream not working because space make deaf" - In space no one can hear you Scream. F*cking beauty
AMV - anime is Bocchi the Rock
What do you think it smells like, sex or shyte?
\m/ {>.<} \m/
Spicier!
BANANA!!
Can you feel the love tonight...
Foreign policy
Add a nazi salute and invading a peaceful countries to the list
Yooooonnnnngggg
I'm a bearded 6ft , 220lb 45-year-old straight widower from Texas with visible ink. I love wearing this shirt out in public. No one says shyte. Which is sad cause I'm a nice guy. Love, peace, and chicken grease ?
item.dc:creator: EdwinEastwood
